summary: Iteration 50: Party-wise Summary Tab in Private Trading - All 15 backend tests PASSED, all frontend UI elements verified via Playwright
critical_code_review_comments: Party Summary API endpoint /api/private-trading/party-summary returns correct structure with parties array and totals object
All 10 fields present in party data: party_name, mandi_name, agent_name, purchase_amount, purchase_paid, purchase_balance, sale_amount, sale_received, sale_balance, net_balance
Balance calculations verified: purchase_balance = purchase_amount - purchase_paid, sale_balance = sale_amount - sale_received, net_balance = purchase_balance - sale_balance
Totals aggregation correct - sums all party values
Search filter working for party/mandi/agent names
Excel export /api/private-trading/party-summary/excel returns 200 with spreadsheet content
report_config.json has party_summary_report with all 10 columns correctly defined
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used - 1 private_paddy entry (Annu (Utkela)/Utkela/Annu) with purchase_amount=137,484, purchase_paid=0, purchase_balance=137,484
context_for_next_testing_agent: Party Summary tab fully functional in Private Trading page. Shows aggregated view across Paddy Purchase and Rice Sale. Data verified: Annu (Utkela) party with Rs.137,484 purchase balance, Rs.0 sale balance, net balance Rs.137,484. All UI elements working: 10-column table, summary cards, date range filter, search, PDF/Excel export, TOTAL row.

api_endpoint.GET /api/private-trading/party-summary: PASSED - Returns parties array and totals object
api_endpoint.date_range_filter: PASSED - date_from and date_to parameters work

party_data_fields.all_10_fields: PASSED - party_name, mandi_name, agent_name, purchase_amount, purchase_paid, purchase_balance, sale_amount, sale_received, sale_balance, net_balance

report_config.10_columns: PASSED - All columns defined with correct fields

party_summary_tab.visible: VERIFIED - data-testid='tab-pvt-summary' with sky blue styling
